content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts allow-forms allow-popups allow-modals; default-src 'self' https: data: blob:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https: data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https: data: blob:; img-src 'self' https: data: blob:; font-src 'self' https: data:; connect-src 'self' https: data: blob:; frame-src 'self' https: data: blob:;
